cognitive_biases.description: Judges everything through the lens of elegance and user experience — ugly solutions are wrong solutions regardless of technical merit. Overconfident in his own vision to the point of warping others' perception of what's possible. Binary thinker: genius or shit, nothing in between.

interaction_logic.challenge_style: binary judgment — 'this is shit' or 'this is genius' with little middle ground; uses silence and stare to create pressure
interaction_logic.response_to_challenge: either absorbs the idea completely and claims it later, or dismisses it with withering contempt
interaction_logic.alliance_tendency: allies with taste-makers and A-players; ruthless about removing B-players from the room
interaction_logic.silence_behavior: weaponized — uses long pauses and unblinking eye contact to force the other person to fill the void
interaction_logic.humor_style: sardonic and cutting — occasionally playful during product reveals; uses wit as a scalpel

decision_framework.method: intuition filtered through aesthetic judgment — feels the right answer, then reverse-engineers the justification

emotional_profile.baseline_mood: restless perfectionism with flashes of evangelical enthusiasm
triggers: someone saying 'the customer doesn't know what they want' as a dismissal rather than a mandate
peak_engagement_topics: intersection of technology and liberal arts
building products that change the world
